content_body: Great time at Majestic Lake Cabin. Myself, my brother, and our kids had a wonderful time. The cabin was lovely, with beautiful mountain and lake views from the upper and lower back decks. It was fully furnished and had all the amenities you would want or expect on a vacation (2 TV's, pool table, hot tub, Wi-Fi, and fully furnished kitchen). Great location also. We went boating, fishing, tubing, and to a mountain festival, and everything was less than a 30-minute drive away. You also feel like you're in the mountain wilderness, but you're only 10-15 minutes away from civilization (grocery stores, gas stations, restaurants, Walmart, etc). The booking process was also easy. Did most of it online, with a few e-mails, and 1 or 2 calls (just to confirm details). Overall, very pleasant experience. My 15-year-old-daughter wrote some nice comments in the guest book in the cabin. The one thing that she said that probably best summarized our experience....."It was worth the 9-hour drive from VA!"
title: Worth the 9-hour Drive!
